provenance.note: Seed file: PEP verified, ACS pending CI run with CENSUS_API_KEY
validityRules: ACS pair gap must be >= 5 years (non-overlapping 5-year windows)
All 83 Michigan counties required for every metric and vintage
Population range: 500–2,000,000 per county per year
Uninsured rate range: 0–50% per county per vintage
HTML-masked 200 responses cause immediate build failure

excludedMetrics.reason: Model-based; CDC explicitly discourages cross-release trend comparison
Insufficient Michigan county coverage for defensible trend (8 of 83 counties seeded in v1)
Feeding America county estimates use a national model; year-over-year county deltas reflect model updates, not real change

uninsuredRate.description: Percent civilian noninstitutionalized population uninsured, ACS 5-year

population.label: VERIFIED
